name: SIRT6 overexpression
summary: Preclinical SIRT6 gain-of-function intervention represented by transgenic mouse studies reporting lifespan, frailty, metabolic, and IGF1-linked signals.
mechanism_summary: Increases SIRT6 activity, a chromatin-linked deacylase and genome-maintenance regulator with overlapping roles in DNA repair, metabolism, inflammation, and IGF1-related signaling.

open_questions: Whether SIRT6 activation can be delivered safely and controllably in humans
Whether lifespan and frailty effects replicate outside transgenic mouse models
Which SIRT6 mechanism is most responsible for aging-relevant benefit
